name: get_logs
description: Retrieve authentication and management event logs from your Auth0 tenant. Use for security auditing, troubleshooting login failures, and monitoring user activity. Supports filtering by event type, user, and date range.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Lucene query string to filter logs (e.g., 'type:"s"' for successful logins, 'user_id:"auth0|..."').

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of log entries per page (max 100). Default is 50.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field and direction: 'date:-1' for newest first, 'date:1' for oldest first.

parameters.name: include_totals
parameters.description: Whether to include total count in the response.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Log ID to start from (for checkpoint-based pagination).
